Name: Average time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed after the execution of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers following Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time elapsed between Manuscript Export Succeeded and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed compared to the time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Average cycle time of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed versus variants that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Minimum time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time it takes for SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to reach Plagiarism Originality Report Completed versus the time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-EIC Decision activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection) in variants leading to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average time for Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to be followed by a revision-triggering decision (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Elapsed time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs at least once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-Reviewer Agreed in high-duration variants (performance > 1,000,000 seconds)
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1000000 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum cycle time of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in successful acceptance paths versus rejection or resubmission paths
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and the end of the case

Name: Time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to the next system-generated checkpoint (e.g., SW-Checklist Completed or SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
